raw.objective: “to evaluate the effects of age, TBW, daily dose, sex and comedication on the population estimates of VPA clearance”
raw.covariates: Tested: AGE, WT, DDVPA, SEX, Comedication(CBZ) Included: WT, DDVPA, CBZ
raw.observations: The model suggests a non-linear increase of VPA CL with an increase in WT. Also a non-linear relationship between CL and DDVPA is found. The F, Vd, and Ka were fixed in the model; therefore variation in attributed to variation in CL, possibly causing bias. Covariates: WT, daily dose and comedication with CBZ have effect on VPA CL
raw.dose: Steady state, oral doses in patients
raw.equations: CL = (theta1*(WT**theta2)*(DMGKG**theta3)*(theta4**CBZ))*(1+eta1) KA = theta5 V = theta6*WT Cobs= Cipred+eps1 DMGKG: VPA dose in mg/kg/day CBZ: comedication carbamazepine (1:yes, 0:no)
raw.parameter_values: theta1= 0.012 theta2= 0.715 theta3= 0.306 theta4= 1.359 theta5=1.9 theta6=0.24 omega1=0.0462 sigma1= 15.56

extraction_target.title: Valproate population pharmacokinetics in children.

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

sigma.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.residual_error: CL = (theta1*(WT**theta2)*(DMGKG**theta3)*(theta4**CBZ))*(1+eta1) KA = theta5 V = theta6*WT Cobs= Cipred+eps1 DMGKG: VPA dose in mg/kg/day CBZ: comedication carbamazepine (1:yes, 0:no)
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.dose: Steady state, oral doses in patients
study.objective: “to evaluate the effects of age, TBW, daily dose, sex and comedication on the population estimates of VPA clearance”

covariates.raw: Tested: AGE, WT, DDVPA, SEX, Comedication(CBZ) Included: WT, DDVPA, CBZ

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
